description: Budget-bound x402 payment wallet for AI agents — pays HTTP 402 URLs, capped locally. No backend.
name: io.github.piprail/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your wallet's private key/seed for the chosen chain. Optional: omit it to run read-only (discover/quote/register/budget/guide); set it to let the agent pay. Stays on your machine; the spend policy caps every payment.
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Pay across several chains (instead of PIPRAIL_CHAIN): a comma-separated list, e.g. base,polygon,solana. Give each its own PIPRAIL_<CHAIN>_KEY (+ optional PIPRAIL_<CHAIN>_RPC_URL). The agent pays whichever chain a 402 asks for — the first listed that can settle — under one shared budget.
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_CHAINS

environmentVariables.description: Max spend per single payment, in token units (default: 0.10).
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_MAX_AMOUNT

environmentVariables.description: Lifetime spend cap per token, in token units (default: 10.00).
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_MAX_TOTAL

environmentVariables.description: Cross-token GRAND TOTAL: one spend cap per denomination across every stablecoin and chain, e.g. USD:20.00,EUR:5.00. Not a price oracle — sums tokens of the same unit, each counted 1:1. Native coins are excluded.
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_MAX_TOTAL_DENOM

environmentVariables.description: Lifetime cap on the NUMBER of payments, across every chain + token (e.g. 100).
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_MAX_PAYMENTS

environmentVariables.description: Cap on the number of payments within PIPRAIL_WINDOW_SECONDS (a rolling rate limit; set PIPRAIL_WINDOW_SECONDS too).
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_MAX_PAYMENTS_PER_WINDOW

environmentVariables.description: Emit an early-warning event when spend crosses this fraction of any cap, e.g. 0.8 (80%). Needs PIPRAIL_EVENT_LOG to be visible.
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_WARN_AT_FRACTION

environmentVariables.description: Path to a local append-only spend log. When set, the budget (lifetime, grand total, counts) SURVIVES a restart — hydrated from this file. No backend; you own the file.
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_SPEND_LOG

environmentVariables.description: Mirror payment events (settled / declined / budget-threshold) as one-line JSON to 'stderr' or a file path — the operator's notification stream. Default: off.
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_EVENT_LOG

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed token symbols, plus the alias 'native' for the chain's coin (default: USDC).
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_TOKENS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated payment schemes to settle (default: onchain-proof). Add 'exact' (onchain-proof,exact) to also pay standard x402 servers GASLESS on EVM + Solana (method auto-selected).
environmentVariables.name: PIPRAIL_SCHEMES

title: PipRail
